name: Easypak
message: EasyPak is a leading provider of thermoformed packaging solutionsfor a wide range of industries and applications globally. We offer dependable, high-performing plastic packaging for food, consumer goods, medical, and industrial applications.We will upload 70gb of corporate data soon. Very detailed employees (SSNs of 30  employees and other personal information), customers' SSNs, lot of contracts and agreements, financials, confidential files, NDAs and so on.
